tableDetails.comment: Static calendar dimension covering the TPC-H date range (1992-1998), including a fiscal calendar (FY starts 1 April). Generated via sequence + explode; rebuilt on each refresh.
Geography dimension (SCD1, current view) joining nation and region from silver.
Product catalog dimension built as a materialized view over the silver part SCD2 table; preserves __START_AT/__END_AT version history.

Supplier dimension (genuine SCD2) built as a materialized view. Carries the real __START_AT/__END_AT validity windows from the silver supplier SCD2 feed; address/phone/nation joined at their current version.
